message:
fix(cli): apply clippy lints — sort_unstable, format inlining, redundant clones, contains_key

Mechanical clippy fixes across the doctor and progress CLI modules:

- doctor/mod.rs: Add #![allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] module-level
  attribute. Replace sort() with sort_unstable() for primitive tuple
  sorting. Inline format string arguments (format!("... {}", var) →
  format!("... {var}")). Replace .get("key").is_some() with
  .contains_key("key"). Remove unnecessary .clone() on values that
  are consumed (happy path fixture, idempotency key, empty string
  construction via String::new()).

- progress.rs: Remove two unnecessary .clone() calls on output strings
  that are only used in subsequent assert_with_log! macro invocations
  where the value is moved, not borrowed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
